description_long: This is a rectangular, four-story apartment building with a slightly sloped, shingled roof in a muted greenish-gray color. The front facade features three vertical rows of symmetrically aligned windows, each with simple white trim, giving the building a uniform and orderly appearance. The side and rear walls are plain, lacking windows or decorative elements, and are finished in a similar greenish-gray stucco. The roof is covered with rectangular shingles, showing some weathering and subtle color variation. The building sits on a slightly raised base with a contrasting trim, suggesting a concrete or stone foundation. There are no visible balconies, entrances, or external ornamentation, giving the structure a utilitarian and somewhat austere look.
description: A four-story, rectangular apartment building with a greenish-gray stucco exterior, symmetrical window rows on the front, and a shingled sloped roof. The sides and rear are plain, with no visible entrances or balconies.
description_view_0: Front view showing three vertical rows of symmetrically aligned windows and the sloped shingled roof.
description_view_1: Rear-left view displaying a plain wall with no windows or features, and the roof's shingle pattern.
description_view_2: Rear view with a completely blank wall and a clear view of the roof's slope and shingles.
description_view_3: Right-side view showing the plain wall and a partial view of the windowed front facade.
attribute_window_arrangement: The windows are arranged in three vertical columns on the front facade, evenly spaced and symmetrically aligned across all four floors.
